room.caption: [Vault Shifting Rooms D] Did you see these maps in the order of A -> D? Eh, probably not.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" Why does this exist? It never served a purpose."

bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=192 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_C} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_A}

bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=944 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_C} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_A}

bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=14 newMapX=1488 newMapY=1360 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_C} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_A}

bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=192 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_C} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_A}

bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=944 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_C} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_A}

bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newStep=5 newTrans=15 newMapX=48 newMapY=1360 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_C} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_A}

bShowArrow=true exitType=1 image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=8 newStep=5 newTrans=17 newMapX=640 newMapY=48 if global.vaultRooms=1 or global.vaultRooms=3 {toRoom=rVault_R_A} else if global.vaultRooms=2 or global.vaultRooms=4 {toRoom=rVault_R_C}
